description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Blocks must slide horizontally across the screen and require precise timing to drop.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Any portion of a block that hangs off the edge should be sliced off, making subsequent blocks narrower.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game ends when a block becomes too narrow to land on the previous one.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: A perfect stack within a small pixel alignment should grant a bonus and prevent the block from narrowing.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The camera should pan up as the tower grows taller to maintain focus on the stacking action.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
